summary: Comprehensive testing of Dating API, Dating UI, ReelCreator, and extracted modals. All 16 Dating API tests passed (profile CRUD, discover, likes, matches, secret crush). Dating UI fully functional with Italian text, profile cards, Secret Crush modal with 'Aggiungi' buttons. ReelCreator loads with camera controls (camera access fails in browser preview as expected). Extracted modals (EmojiPickerModal, AttachmentMenu) exist in code and are properly structured.
passed_tests: Dating API: POST /api/dating/profile creates profile - PASSED
Dating API: GET /api/dating/profile retrieves profile - PASSED
Dating API: GET /api/dating/discover returns profiles - PASSED
Dating API: GET /api/dating/discover?mode=friendship works - PASSED
Dating API: POST /api/dating/like creates like interaction - PASSED
Dating API: POST /api/dating/like with super_like works - PASSED
Dating API: POST /api/dating/pass records pass - PASSED
Dating API: GET /api/dating/matches returns matches - PASSED
Dating API: GET /api/dating/likes-you returns likers - PASSED
Dating API: POST /api/dating/secret-crush adds crush - PASSED
Dating API: GET /api/dating/secret-crushes returns crushes - PASSED
Dating API: DELETE /api/dating/secret-crush/{id} removes crush - PASSED
Dating API: Secret crush limit of 9 enforced - PASSED
Dating API: Unauthorized access rejected - PASSED
Dating API: Profile update works - PASSED
Dating API: Profile preferences update works - PASSED
Dating UI: Page loads at /dating route
Dating UI: Header displays 'Dating' title
Dating UI: Tabs present (Persone a cui piaci, Amicizia, Match)
Dating UI: Profile cards display with name, age, Italian zodiac
Dating UI: Like/Pass buttons work
Dating UI: Secret Crush modal opens with 'Crush Segreto' title
Dating UI: Secret Crush modal shows friends with 'Aggiungi' buttons
Dating UI: Match modal shows Italian text ('Nuova amicizia!', 'vi piacete a vicenda')
Dating UI: Feature buttons row (Serie, Spotlight, Amicizia, Crush, Instagram)
ReelCreator: Page loads at /reels/create
ReelCreator: Camera controls visible (Timer, Speed, Flip, Gallery, Record)
ReelCreator: Italian error message for camera access
ReelCreator: Text/Sticker/Filter buttons exist in code for preview mode
Chat: WhatsApp-style interface loads at /chat
Extracted Modals: EmojiPickerModal component properly structured
Extracted Modals: AttachmentMenu component properly structured
critical_code_review_comments: Dating API routes properly implemented with MongoDB integration
Secret Crush feature correctly limits to 9 crushes and detects mutual crushes
Dating UI uses SAMPLE_PROFILES array for demo (MOCKED - not fetching from backend API)
ReelCreator text/sticker/filter overlays properly implemented in preview mode
Extracted modals (EmojiPickerModal, AttachmentMenu) are well-structured and reusable
All Italian translations are complete and accurate
seed_data_creation: None - Dating UI uses SAMPLE_PROFILES array, API creates test data dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dating API fully tested with 16 passing tests. Dating UI uses SAMPLE_PROFILES for demo display but backend API is real MongoDB. ReelCreator text/sticker/filter buttons appear in preview mode (after recording video). Camera access fails in browser preview (expected). Auth token can be set in localStorage as 'auth_token'. Mobile viewport 430x932 recommended for Dating UI testing.

mocked_apis_list: Dating profiles display - uses SAMPLE_PROFILES array in component for demo
Match notifications - uses SAMPLE_MATCHES array in component

dating_page.header: Dating title with menu and profile icons
dating_page.secret_crush_modal: data-testid='secret-crush-modal' with friends list and Aggiungi buttons

extracted_modals.attachment_menu: AttachmentMenu.jsx with Photos, Camera, Document, Contact, Location options
